title: Electric Steering Lock) input check
system: Honda Smart Key System Honda Smart Key System (MICU

crossRefs.label: Disconnect each coupler in the fuse box
Disconnect the 12P coupler from the electronic steering lock

blocks.text: Honda Smart Key System (MICU, Electric Steering Lock) input check
Check DTC at HDS before performing input inspection.
Disconnect each coupler in the fuse box The following is a list of the most common problems with the

refs.label: Disconnect each coupler in the fuse box

blocks.text: 2. Perform input checks and if all is normal and there is an abnormality in the system Replace fuse box. Each coupler is all female-terminated on the cord side.
